parsed.production_notes: The entire visual is a single, static image with a distinct AI-art style, featuring hyper-realistic but slightly uncanny characters. The audio is a clear but somewhat monotonous text-to-speech voice, lacking natural human intonation.

characters.appearance: A young man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim to athletic build and a fair complexion. He has short, dark, neatly styled hair. He is only seen from the back and in partial profile, so his facial features are not visible.
characters.wardrobe: A casual grey hooded sweatshirt, dark blue jeans, and grey sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Contemplative and engaged, looking intently at the large screen in front of him.

characters.appearance: A beautiful young Indian woman's head on a cyborg body. She has a fair complexion, large, expressive dark eyes, and defined features. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant updo adorned with white flowers. She wears traditional Indian jewelry, including a maang tikka on her forehead and a nose ring. Her neck and upper torso are robotic, with visible silver wiring and white and pink metallic plates.
characters.wardrobe: Her body is a white and pink robotic shell. She wears a gold and red maang tikka, a gold nose ring with a chain, and has white flowers in her hair.
characters.demeanor: Authoritative yet encouraging, speaking directly to the viewer with varied expressions ranging from serious to smiling.

scenes.setting: A futuristic, circular room with metallic grey walls and ceiling featuring recessed lighting. A large window looks out onto a city skyline at sunset. The floor has glowing concentric circles. The scene is lit by the ambient light of the room and a strong magenta glow from a giant phone screen.

panels.panel_visual_description: A wide shot of a futuristic, circular, metallic-grey room. A young man, Character A, is seen from behind, standing on a floor with glowing circular patterns. He is looking at a giant, vertically oriented smartphone that dominates the center of the frame. Through a large window behind him, a city skyline with a prominent skyscraper is visible against a sunset sky. On the screen of the giant phone, a close-up of Character B, a female Indian cyborg, is displayed. Her head is human-like with traditional jewelry, while her neck and chest are robotic. The image on the phone is bathed in a vibrant pink and magenta light.

scenes.visual_description: A static, AI-generated image shows a young man (Character A) in a grey hoodie standing in a futuristic room, looking at a giant smartphone. The phone's screen displays a large image of a female Indian cyborg (Character B). The background shows a city skyline at sunset. Throughout the video, animated text overlays in purple boxes appear and disappear in sync with the voiceover, highlighting keywords from the speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: हर बार मीटिंग में चुप रहते हो तो अभी भी रील्स क्यों देख रहे हो? जाके इंग्लिश सीख लो वरना तुम्हारा प्रमोशन कोई और ले जाएगा। [If you stay quiet in every meeting, why are you still watching Reels? Go and learn English, or someone else will take your promotion.]

Character B says: दुनिया AI की हो रही है। स्कूल के बच्चे से लेकर बड़ी कंपनीज तक, लोग हर चीज में AI का इस्तेमाल कर रहे हैं। तुम क्यों अभी पीछे हो? [The world is becoming AI's. From school children to big companies, people are using AI in everything. Why are you still behind?]

Character B says: वीडियोस और बुक्स से इंग्लिश सीख रहे हो? SpeakX डाउनलोड करो और मेरी तरह AI इंग्लिश टीचर्स के साथ बात करके इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करो। [Are you learning English from videos and books? Download SpeakX and practice English by talking with AI English teachers like me.]

Character B says: आखिर प्रैक्टिस से ही तो इंग्लिश सीख पाओगे, सिर्फ रटने से नहीं। मैं तुम्हारी गलतियां बिना किसी जजमेंट के ठीक कर देती हूं। [After all, you can only learn English through practice, not just by memorizing. I correct your mistakes without any judgment.]

Character B says: मेरे साथ लाखों लोगों ने इंग्लिश सीखी है और अपनी जिंदगी बदली है। तो तुम क्यों वेट कर रहे हो? आओ, SpeakX डाउनलोड करो और मेरे साथ फर्स्ट क्लास इंग्लिश बोलना सीखो। [Lakhs of people have learned English with me and changed their lives. So why are you waiting? Come, download SpeakX and learn to speak first-class English with me.]
